Watch: Kasaragod decides three-way battle: Kerala Elections 2026
articles.description: Kasaragod, Kerala’s northern gateway and “Saptha Bhasha Sangamam Bhoomi,” heads into the April 9 assembly election with a tight three-cornered contest. The Indian Union Muslim League-led UDF faces a strong challenge from the Bharatiya Janata Party, while the Communist Party of India (Marxist)-backed independent adds a third angle. UDF’s Kallatra Mahin Haji banks on legacy, BJP’s Ashwini M.L. pushes development, and LDF-supported Shanavas Padhoor targets grassroots voters. Key issues include healthcare gaps, dependence on Mangaluru, Endosulfan concerns, and linguistic rights.

articles.title: Farooq Abdullah calls for end to West Asia conflict to ensure global peace
articles.description: Farooq Abdullah said stopping the war was a question for "the big powers" and the people can only pray that God somehow gets rid of the conflict

articles.title: No crime if married man lives with consenting adult woman, says Allahabad HC; insists on keeping law, morality apart
articles.description: The Allahabad High Court said that a married man in a live-in relationship is not committing a criminal offence, prioritising individual rights over societal morality. The Court emphasised that legal principles should remain separate from societal views.

articles.title: ‘Israeli Military will collapse in on itself’: IDF Chief raises ‘10 red flags’ amid ongoing war against Iran
articles.description: Gen Zamir warned that IDF faces potential collapse due to a manpower shortage exacerbated by ongoing conflicts. He emphasized the urgent need for conscription and reserve duty laws to ensure readiness for routine missions amidst rising casualties and prolonged engagements with Iran and Lebanon.

articles.title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election 2026: AIADMK releases manifesto; assures free refrigerators to women ration card-holders
articles.description: The distribution of free refrigerators to women beneficiaries of the PDS, the revision of electricity tariff on common facilities in multi-storey apartments, and the increase in horizontal reservation for government school students in admission to the medical courses from 7.5% to 10.5% are among the highlights of the manifesto

articles.title: 59 school vehicle drivers booked for drunk driving in Bengaluru
articles.description: Police officials said the violations pose a grave risk to children and other motorists on the road

articles.title: Nifty March futures trade at discount - Business Standard
articles.description: Nifty March futures trade at discount  Business Standard

topStories.title: 'Wait till…': Cong slams Modi govt for not passing on fuel tax cut to the people; predicts price hike with date, reason
topStories.description: After centre's claim that cut in excise duty on petrol and diesel will provide relief to consumers, Congress argues that this move benefits only oil companies

topStories.title: US Senate votes to fund most of Homeland Security to end airports chaos - but ICE excluded
topStories.description: The late-night vote is a step towards bringing the 40-day partial shutdown - and long security lines at US airports - to an end.

topStories.title: What we know so far about the Supreme Court’s ruling on reservation for converted Dalits
topStories.description: The Supreme Court ruled that a person professing any religion other than Hinduism, Buddhism, or Sikhism cannot be recognised as a member of a Scheduled Caste

topStories.title: PM Modi must use his relationships to help end US-Iran war: Omar Abdullah
topStories.description: Abdullah, who is the the Leader of the House in Legislative Assembly, made the statement on Iran war after several National Conference MLAs pressed for it

topStories.title: 'My daughter is under the rubble': Inside Tehran as civilian toll of strikes rises
topStories.description: One month since the US and Israel launched strikes on Iran, Tehran residents tell the BBC their lives have been devastated.

topStories.title: US Senate approves funding for most of Homeland Security, but not ICE: What we know so far
topStories.description: The agreement would fund DHS components such as the Transportation Security Administration and US Coast Guard, the statement said.

topStories.title: ‘MLAs have the right’: Shivakumar backs cross-party demand for free IPL tickets, takes ‘gyaan’ dig at BJP's Surya
topStories.description: The MLAs demand for free IPL tickets has blurred the party lines with lawmakers from Congress and BJP making the demand in unison.

topStories.title: New COVID variant BA.3.2 spreads in US: Should you be worried?
topStories.description: Despite its “hyper-mutated” profile, there is no evidence so far that BA.3.2 is making people sicker.

topStories.title: How Cryptocurrencies Are Aiding Iran Amid War With US-Israel
topStories.description: More than $10 million worth of cryptocurrencies left Iranian exchange platforms since first day of Israeli-US airstrikes on Iran.

topStories.title: US Labor Department Proposes Major Wage Hike For H1B Workers
topStories.description: The US DOL proposes major reforms to prevailing wages for H1B, H1B1, E3, and PERM visa holders, increasing average certified pay by $14,000 per year.

topStories.description: The highly unofficial, but usually accurate, Pentagon Pizza Index signals that the US military might be planning something big.

topStories.description: Rescue teams from the IRCS have been searching the rubble of residential buildings hit in US-Israeli attacks on Iran.

dailyNews.description: Latest victims include six people killed in Qom as Iran announces grim milestone of nearly 2,000 war dead.

dailyNews.description: Reports say the US pressured France to rescind Ramaphosa’s invitation after Trump threatened to boycott the summit.

dailyNews.title: Department of Education employees are working every day to put themselves 'out of a job,' but why?
dailyNews.description: The Department of Education reached its 10th interagency agreement, moving student lending to Treasury. Undersecretary Nicholas Kent says the goal is to close the department entirely.

dailyNews.title: Cam Newton views adding 18th regular-season game as 'good business,' questions how preseason games will work
dailyNews.description: Cam Newton said an NFL 18th regular-season game would further dilute preseason, calling the league's expansion push simply "good business" for the sport.

dailyNews.title: Newsom still backing $114M 'bridge to nowhere' for mountain lions and butterflies
dailyNews.description: Gov. Gavin Newsom's $114 million wildlife crossing has critics calling it a patronage program as California now faces a $2.9 billion budget deficit.

dailyNews.title: Fetterman tells far-left prosecutor to 'lighten up' after threatening to arrest ICE agents over raids
dailyNews.description: Sen. John Fetterman criticized fellow Democrats for ignoring violent crimes by illegal aliens after a Venezuelan national was charged in a Loyola student's killing last week.

dailyNews.title: Popular diet tied to lower dementia risk for some groups, study reveals
dailyNews.description: A new study suggests that eating more unprocessed meat may slow cognitive decline in older adults carrying the APOE gene variant, which is linked to Alzheimer's risk.

dailyNews.title: Marjorie Taylor Greene says Trump, GOP ‘governed America LAST,’ predicts midterm losses
dailyNews.description: Former Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene asserted that President Donald Trump and other Republicans promised "America First" but are delivering "America LAST."

dailyNews.title: Knives out for Fetterman as Democrats turn on one-time progressive star
dailyNews.description: Pennsylvania Sen. John Fetterman faces Democratic backlash as Rep. Brendan Boyle calls for his ouster over his support for Mullin and voter ID stances.

dailyNews.title: Fox News Digital's News Quiz: March 27, 2026
dailyNews.description: This week's news quiz covers first lady Melania Trump welcoming a humanoid robot to the White House and personality Howie Mandel calling out a TV host.

dailyNews.title: Ted Cruz unleashes on Dems for risking American lives with DHS shutdown: 'Radical open-border base'
dailyNews.description: Sen. Ted Cruz believes Democrats are moving the goalposts on DHS funding, claiming Chuck Schumer rejected a deal Republicans accepted to end the agency's 40-day funding lapse.

topStories.description: A generation ago, foreign fury over the Iraq invasion often blurred into anti-Americanism. Now, some Europeans seem ready to distinguish between the president and the American people.

dailyNews.title: Senate approves most DHS funding, hours after Trump promised to restart TSA pay
dailyNews.description: The Senate agreed early Friday to fund most of the Department of Homeland Security in an effort to end a standoff in Congress that led to massive lines at many airports.

dailyNews.title: Trump says he'll order DHS to start paying TSA officers as shutdown drags on
dailyNews.description: President Trump said he will sign an executive order to restart pay for TSA officers, who have gone more than a month without a full paycheck.

dailyNews.title: President Trump's 2026 State of the Union Address and the Democratic response
dailyNews.description: President Trump delivers the longest State of the Union address in recent history, followed by the Democratic response from Virginia Governor Abigail Spanberger.

dailyNews.title: Witkoff floats Iran peace plan as Trump extends pause on energy plant strikes
dailyNews.description: President Trump has extended a pause on striking Iranian energy infrastructure until April 6.

dailyNews.title: Judge blocks Pentagon from labeling Anthropic AI a "supply chain risk"
dailyNews.description: A judge has blocked the Trump administration from labeling Anthropic a supply chain risk and cutting off all federal work with the artificial intelligence firm, an early win for Anthropic in its bitter feud with the government.

dailyNews.title: Trump says he's granting Iran's request to extend pause on energy site strikes
dailyNews.description: President Trump announced the extension of the pause "per Iranian government request."

dailyNews.title: Oil prices climb to $110 as Trump's Iran deadline extension fails to allay supply fears
dailyNews.description: Oil prices traded higher after U.S. President Donald Trump said Iran had allowed 10 oil tankers to pass through the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: David Sacks says his time as Trump's crypto and AI czar has ended
dailyNews.description: The venture capitalist said he will still be a part of the White House's Technology committee and will help push Trump's AI plan forward.

dailyNews.title: Anthropic wins preliminary injunction in DOD fight as judge cites 'First Amendment retaliation'
dailyNews.description: A federal judge in San Francisco granted Anthropic's request for a preliminary injunction in its lawsuit against the Trump administration.

dailyNews.title: Federal Reserve urges judge to deny bid to revive Jerome Powell probe subpoenas
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump, in his latest jibe at Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell, called him a "moron,' and blasted him over keeping interest rates too high.

dailyNews.title: Trump says he will sign order to pay TSA workers following weeks of long lines
dailyNews.description: President Trump posted on Truth Social that he is signing an order to pay TSA workers. They have been working without pay for 41 days during the partial shutdown of the Department of Homeland Security. Roughly 11% of officers are calling out daily, leading to long TSA lines at airports. NBC News’ Tom Costello reports.

dailyNews.title: Ambitious, authoritarian and talking to Trump? The hard-liners rising in Iran
dailyNews.description: The Israeli military has systematically killed Iran’s top leaders, so when President Donald Trump said this week that talks are being held with Iran, the biggest question was: Who exactly is the U.S. talking to
